title: ProDec 25m Hard Floor Protector Film - Waterproof Self Adhesive Hardfloor Protector Roll, Protects Against Dust, Dirt, Paint, Paste, Spills - Hard Floor Protection Roll
features: 625mm width x 25m length hard floor protector film self adhesive for temporary protection against dust, dirt and liquid spills such as paint, varnish, paste and more. The sticky floor protector roll is puncture resistant and waterproof, ensuring your floors stay clean during decorating and other building or renovation work.

ProDec's self adhesive floor protection roll is easy to apply, requires no special applicator tool and leaves no residue when peeled from the surface. It's the ideal floor cover protector for decorating and other maintenance work: laminate floor protector, wood protector, tile protector and other hard surfaces.
Suitable for hard floors such as wood, laminate and tiles. Not for use on carpets: a self adhesive carpet protector film grade is available.
The film is 625mm wide which makes it ideal for hallways as well and it's also safer than dust sheets: it stays in place and gives no trip hazard. Floor protector decorating, building, joinery.
The floor covering protection film is also useful for creating walkways so people tread only where you want them to.
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Waterproof protection against spills, stains and dirt Hard Floor Protector is ideal for keeping surfaces such as wood and tiled floors clean and free from dust, dirt, spillages, debris and general soiling that occurs during decorating, building work and general maintenance. It's made from self-adhesive polythene film that is reverse wound so it applies easily by hand or foot without the need for any special application tools, and unlike dust sheets that can move around and expose floors underneath, stays in place once down. Presenting no trip hazard, it's safer than dust sheets and its excellent puncture resistance enables it to withstand heavy foot traffic. It protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more and can be easily wiped clean if spills do happen. Hard Floor Protector leaves no adhesive residue when peeled and should be removed within 14 days of application - note that the product is not re-usable once taken up from the surface. May not be suitable for all types of LVT flooring; test for compatibility before use. If you need to protect carpets use ProDec Carpet Protector. Hard Floor Protector is not suitable for use on carpets as it has a thinner film gauge and is liable to puncture on carpets. Carpet Protector Carpet Protector Carpet Protector Hard Floor Protector Hard Floor Protector Hard Floor Protector Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 2.3 out of 5 stars 2 — Roll length 20m 25m 50m 20m 25m 50m Width 600mm 625mm 625mm 625mm 625mm 625mm Where to use Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Colour Yellow Yellow Yellow Clear Clear Clear Temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
